title: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives
display_title: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives
wikitext:
[]: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by MaggotMaster » Sat Nov 11, 2006 11:55 am So, we are all familiar with the Angels, giant, not-so-divine beings that bring DEATH AND RUIN to Tokyo-3 and consistently get their asses kicked by NERV and their equally huge NOT REALLY ROBOTS, the Evas. So, all of the Angels we see in the series besides Adam, Lilith, Gaghiel and Lilim seem to think it's REALLY FUCKING FUNNY to attack Tokyo-3 whenever they get the chance, besides the obvious "we did it for the lulz", is there any REASON to this? Now, the infamous CI gives us some information on both the origins and objectives of the Angels, but most of it doesn't make much sense or is too vague, not to mention the fact it contradicts itself: D. In-Depth Information Nerv Headquarters was constructed inside the Black Moon containing Lilith. The Angels are all heading for Nerv H.Q. so that they can make contact with Lilith, the white giant in Terminal Dogma. They were aiming for her from the start, not Adam.

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Nov 11, 2006 12:10 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Now, the infamous CI gives us some information on both the origins and objectives of the Angels, but most of it doesn't make much sense of is too vague, not to mention the fact it contradicts itself:

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 12:27 pm I remember coming up with the theory that the Angels were actually heading for the Black Moon specifically since they had no other "common point of reference" on the globe (White Moon got blown up, and all), and they made up everything else along the way. Then I translated the CI. "Oh, crap, so much for that. It actually might have worked if Anno wasn't being such a poo-poo head." MaggotMaster wrote: But wait, why did SEELE send an Angel (Tabris) to make contact with Lilith in EP 24? Would not this RESET ALL LIFE, which is something they were trying to AVOID?

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Sat Nov 11, 2006 12:29 pm Reichu wrote: What are you implying about the NGE First Aid Manual?

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 11, 2006 2:15 pm MaggotMaster wrote: Now, the infamous CI gives us some information on both the origins and objectives of the Angels, but most of it doesn't make much sense or is too vague, not to mention the fact it contradicts itself: D. In-Depth Information Nerv Headquarters was constructed inside the Black Moon containing Lilith. The Angels are all heading for Nerv H.Q. so that they can make contact with Lilith, the white giant in Terminal Dogma. They were aiming for her from the start, not Adam.

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 3:10 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I don't really see a contradiction there it's all about perspective. It's info on NERV and what they think the Angels are after, and info on the Angels themselves.

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 11, 2006 3:27 pm Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I don't really see a contradiction there it's all about perspective. It's info on NERV and what they think the Angels are after, and info on the Angels themselves.

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 3:38 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Cause that's what most of NERV thought in the series?

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 11, 2006 3:44 pm Reichu wrote: Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Cause that's what most of NERV thought in the series?

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Nov 11, 2006 4:24 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: Why would the Magi have such in-depth info on the Angels motives? Maybe it's a review of the Angels behavior during the series and that's the conclusion they came to. Then again it may be something that was never in the Magi in the series.

[]: Re: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 10:46 pm Ornette wrote: I don't think those were supposed to be entries in the Magi. They were mis-dubbed the "Magi Hack Files" by someone on gamefaqs who translated a few of the entries.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Nov 11, 2006 11:00 pm Damnit, why can't Anno stop doing things that make my head hurt?

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Nov 11, 2006 11:01 pm That is your punishment for not just watching NGE once and promptly moving onto the next cool thing.

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 12, 2006 3:55 am this thread showing all these conflicts and a questions left unanswered is beggining to give me a notion... what if...CI isnt canon? Has Anno ever said it was? (hides from Reichu)

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 12, 2006 4:22 am master0rolando wrote: what if...CI isnt canon? Has Anno ever said it was? (hides from Reichu)

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Nov 12, 2006 5:43 am Reichu wrote: Regarding NGE2, Anno acted as a consultant for the game and reportedly spent ~10 hours being interviewed and filling out a giant questionnaire. It seems logical to guess that the game's hidden "answers to Eva's mysteries" (the CI) -- shamelessly used to hype NGE2 -- were taken from what Anno himself provided...

[]:             Quote Post by master0rolando » Sun Nov 12, 2006 6:06 am i think many of the people on this forum would die a little inside if CI turned out to be bull... considering how often its cited

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Nov 12, 2006 10:23 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Yet Anno himself specifically stated that all the answers would never be provided in Evangelion.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Sun Nov 12, 2006 5:26 pm Yeah, like what the fuck is the Spear really, and it still doesn't explain Rei's temporal magic.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun Nov 12, 2006 5:35 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Reichu wrote: Regarding NGE2, Anno acted as a consultant for the game and reportedly spent ~10 hours being interviewed and filling out a giant questionnaire. It seems logical to guess that the game's hidden "answers to Eva's mysteries" (the CI) -- shamelessly used to hype NGE2 -- were taken from what Anno himself provided...

Article: Angels and their oh so mysterious objectives
 Anno acted as a consultant for the game and reportedly spent ~10 hours being interviewed and filling out a giant questionnaire. It seems logical to guess that the game's hidden "answers to Eva's mysteries" (the CI) -- shamelessly used to hype NGE2 -- were taken from what Anno himself provided...

It seems logical to guess that the game's hidden "answers to Eva's mysteries" (the CI) -- shamelessly used to hype NGE2 -- were taken from what Anno himself provided...
